title: The Teenage Girl Beneath the Lamplight
overview: A young salaryman finds a teenage girl sitting under a lamp post on his way home. She offers to sleep with him in exchange for a place to stay. He turns her down, but gives her a place to stay anyway. Their strange life together begins…

title: Cell Phone
overview: Things are changing quickly for Yoshida, as the girls at work start to take an interest in him. Meanwhile, he tries to get Sayu a cellphone, but she refuses…

title: Living Together
overview: Yoshida settles into his new life with Sayu, but the people around him are quick to notice the change, and very curious about what's going on.

title: Part-Time Job
overview: Sayu picks up a part-time job, which leads her to make a new friend. The new friend wants to come over, but what if she finds about Sayu and Yoshida?

title: Reality
overview: Gotou demands to be taken to see Sayu. Is she trying to get a love rival out of the picture, or is she after something else?

title: Starry Sky
overview: Sayu has an encounter with a man from her recent past, and his intentions aren't good at all.

title: Yearning
overview: As Sayu's family gets closer and closer to tracking her down, she realizes that she may be heading home sooner than she thinks.

title: Summer Festival
overview: Sayu's brother has tracked her down, and she realizes it's only a matter of time before she has to go home. She's forced to reflect; what did she learn since she ran away, and what will she take home with her?

title: Past
overview: Before she goes home, Sayu decides to open up about her terrible past, and what made her run away.

title: Proof
overview: As Sayu prepares to go home, Yoshida is forced to make a choice. Will he let their relationship end here?

title: Resolve
overview: Yoshida follows Sayu back to Hokkaido, as she begins to face her past and come to terms with her future.

title: Mother
overview: Back in Hokkaido, Sayu returns home to confront her mom and decide her future.

title: Future
overview: It's time for Yoshida to head back home, and Sayu to return to her old life. Can she get by without him, and can he get by without her?
